creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: knu
Date: Fri May 23 10:03:23 2014
New Revision: 354922
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354922
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354922/

Log:
  Update to 0.2.0 which integrates the contributed patch.
  
  PR:		ports/189158
  Submitted by:	Masato Minda <minmin@wide.ad.jp>

Modified:
  head/sysutils/zfs-snapshot-clean/Makefile
  head/sysutils/zfs-snapshot-clean/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/zfs-snapshot-clean/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/zfs-snapshot-clean/Makefile	Fri May 23 09:55:25 2014	(r354921)
+++ head/sysutils/zfs-snapshot-clean/Makefile	Fri May 23 10:03:23 2014	(r354922)
@@ -2,14 +2,19 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	zfs-snapshot-clean
-PORTVERSION=	0.1.3
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.0
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
-MASTER_SITES=	http://cloud.github.com/downloads/knu/${PORTNAME}/ \
-		ftp://ftp.iDaemons.org/pub/distfiles/
 
 MAINTAINER=	knu@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Tool to sieve ZFS snapshots as per given spec a la 'pdumpfs-clean'
 
+LICENSE=	BSD2CLAUSE
+
+USE_GITHUB=	yes
+GH_ACCOUNT=	knu
+GH_TAGNAME=	v${PORTVERSION}
+GH_COMMIT=	2cecfa1
+
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 PLIST_FILES=	sbin/${PORTNAME}

==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/zfs-snapshot-clean/distinfo	Fri May 23 09:55:25 2014	(r354921)
